title: Develop and implement sustainable land use strategies
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop and implement sustainable land use strategies demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess requirements for improved land use

pcs.text: Audit site natural resources and identify threats to sustainability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Audit site natural resources and identify threats to sustainability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Audit site natural resources and identify threats to sustainability.

pcs.text: Review production and management plans for sustainable land use principles
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review production and management plans for sustainable land use principles?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review production and management plans for sustainable land use principles.

pcs.text: Assess water resources, quality and impact on erosion
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess water resources, quality and impact on erosion?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess water resources, quality and impact on erosion.

pcs.text: Assess soil health and fertility against production plan requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess soil health and fertility against production plan requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess soil health and fertility against production plan requirements.

pcs.text: Assess vegetation types and coverage, and identify required changes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess vegetation types and coverage, and identify required changes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess vegetation types and coverage, and identify required changes.

pcs.text: Plan and prioritise land and water protection measures and structures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan and prioritise land and water protection measures and structures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan and prioritise land and water protection measures and structures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess requirements for improved land use

elements.title: Carry out structural improvements to address threats to sustainability

pcs.text: Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures in field work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures in field work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures in field work.

pcs.text: Inspect site, record key features and indicate on the site where improvements are required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect site, record key features and indicate on the site where improvements are required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect site, record key features and indicate on the site where improvements are required.

pcs.text: Determine materials for construction from plans and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine materials for construction from plans and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine materials for construction from plans and specifications.

pcs.text: Obtain and organise materials, personnel and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and organise materials, personnel and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and organise materials, personnel and equipment.

pcs.text: Select and check equipment for safe and environmentally sustainable operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and check equipment for safe and environmentally sustainable operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and check equipment for safe and environmentally sustainable operation.

pcs.text: Construct structural works, revegetate area and secure area from livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Construct structural works, revegetate area and secure area from livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Construct structural works, revegetate area and secure area from livestock.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out structural improvements to address threats to sustainability

elements.title: Treat areas of land degradation

pcs.text: Assess land classes and align fences and soil conservation works consistent with class
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess land classes and align fences and soil conservation works consistent with class?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess land classes and align fences and soil conservation works consistent with class.

pcs.text: Protect and maintain contour banks to avoid degradation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Protect and maintain contour banks to avoid degradation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Protect and maintain contour banks to avoid degradation.

pcs.text: Construct and maintain water carrying structures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Construct and maintain water carrying structures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Construct and maintain water carrying structures.

pcs.text: Establish shelter belts for crop and stock protection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish shelter belts for crop and stock protection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish shelter belts for crop and stock protection.

pcs.text: Review and amend soil cultivation and planting practices to prevent erosion
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and amend soil cultivation and planting practices to prevent erosion?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and amend soil cultivation and planting practices to prevent erosion.

pcs.text: Plan grazing strategies to avoid localised soil degradation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan grazing strategies to avoid localised soil degradation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan grazing strategies to avoid localised soil degradation.

pcs.text: Confirm works and plans comply with environmental protection legislation, regulations and codes of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm works and plans comply with environmental protection legislation, regulations and codes of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm works and plans comply with environmental protection legislation, regulations and codes of practice.
